# templates Directory — AI‑Ops Operational Templates

## Overview
The `templates` directory contains all standardized operational templates used across the AI‑Ops Framework.  
These templates ensure consistent documentation, structured decision‑making, reliable incident response, and repeatable operational workflows across engineering, operations, and AI‑agent–driven processes.

This directory represents the authoritative source for all operational templates used in reviews, escalations, readiness checks, SLO definitions, post‑mortems, and more.

All contents are categorized automatically based on filename semantics.  
A complete alphabetical index is included at the bottom.

---

# CATEGORIZED DIRECTORY

## 1. Executive & Status Reporting Templates
Templates used for high‑level communication, executive summaries, and operational status updates.

executive-brief-template.md  
status-update-template.md  
template-status-update.md  

## 2. Alignment, Decision & Change Management Templates
Templates supporting structured decision‑making, alignment checks, and change request workflows.

template-alignment-check.md  
template-decision-record.md  
template-change-request.md  

## 3. Dependency, Risk & QA Review Templates
Templates used to evaluate dependencies, assess risks, and perform quality assurance reviews.

template-dependency-review.md  
template-risk-review.md  
template-qa-review.md  

## 4. Incident, Escalation & Recovery Templates
Templates used for incident reporting, escalation workflows, RCA, and post‑incident analysis.

template-incident-report.md  
template-escalation-report.md  
template-rca.md  
template-post-mortem.md  

## 5. Operational Readiness & Service-Level Templates
Templates used to validate readiness, define service levels, and document operational expectations.

template-operational-readiness-review.md  
template-service-level-review.md  
template-slo-definition.md  

## 6. Runbook Templates
Templates defining operational procedures, troubleshooting steps, and execution workflows.

template-runbook.md

# Summary
The `templates` directory centralizes all operational templates used across the AI‑Ops Framework.  
These templates ensure consistent documentation, structured workflows, and reliable operational execution across all teams and AI‑driven processes.
